# Build normalization functions and search quranic verses for matches
import unicodedata, re

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tatweel (kashida)
    text = re.sub('\u0640', '', text)
    # normalize hamza variants and alef variants
    # convert different alef forms to bare alef (ا)
    text = re.sub('[آأإٱ]', 'ا', text)
    # convert taa marbuta to ه? Actually leave it
    # remove diacritics (tashkeel)
    # Arabic diacritics unicode range:  064B-0652 and others
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    text = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', text)
    # remove punctuation, symbols, parentheses, quotes
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', text)
    # remove extra whitespace and lowercase? Arabic doesn't have case but normalize spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

query_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
qnorm = normalize_ar(query_full)
qnorm, query_full

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
import math

# prepare normalized ayahs list
norms = []
for item in q:
    text = item.get('ayah_text','')
    norm = normalize_ar(text)
    norms.append(norm)

# compute similarity metrics for each verse
def seq_ratio(a,b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None,a,b).ratio()

def token_f1(a,b):
    # tokens space-separated
    atoks = a.split()
    btoks = b.split()
    if not atoks and not btoks: return 1.0
    if not atoks or not btoks: return 0.0
    # count common tokens
    common = len(set(atoks) & set(btoks))
    prec = common / len(atoks)
    rec = common / len(btoks)
    if prec+rec==0: return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

scores = []
for i, norm in enumerate(norms):
    sr = seq_ratio(qnorm, norm)
    tf = token_f1(qnorm, norm)
    scores.append((i, sr, tf, q[i]['ayah_text'], norm))
    
# sort by seq_ratio
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: max(x[1], x[2]), reverse=True)
scores_sorted[:20]

# search tokens in normalized ayah texts
tokens = ['وعد', 'لكم', 'شكر', 'فعل', 'الشكر', 'الشُكْرِ'] # normalized tokens will be without diacritics
# but normalize tokens too
tokens_norm = [normalize_ar(t) for t in tokens]
tokens_norm
matches = []
for i,item in enumerate(q):
    norm = norms[i]
    # check if all tokens present
    present = all(tok in norm for tok in tokens_norm if tok) # maybe too strict
    if present:
        matches.append((i, q[i]['ayah_text'], norm))
len(matches), matches[:20]

# find verses containing token 'شكر'
tok = normalize_ar('شكر')
res = []
for i, item in enumerate(q):
    if tok in norms[i]:
        res.append((i, q[i]['ayah_text'], norms[i]))
len(res), res[:30]

# normalize hadith texts and search for the phrase
hadith_texts = []
for item in h:
    txts = []
    if item.get('Matn'):
        txts.append(item.get('Matn'))
    if item.get('hadithTxt'):
        txts.append(item.get('hadithTxt'))
    # join
    full = " ".join([t for t in txts if t])
    hadith_texts.append(full)

len(hadith_texts)

qnorm = normalize_ar("وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ")
matches_h = []
for i, txt in enumerate(hadith_texts):
    norm = normalize_ar(txt)
    # compute similarity metrics
    sr = SequenceMatcher(None, qnorm, norm).ratio()
    tf = token_f1(qnorm, norm)
    if sr>0.5 or tf>0.5: # initial threshold to inspect
        matches_h.append((i, sr, tf, h[i].get('Matn') or h[i].get('hadithTxt')))

len(matches_h), matches_h[:20]

# find verses containing 'وعد' and 'لكم' anywhere
tok1 = normalize_ar('وعد')
tok2 = normalize_ar('لكم')

candidates = []
for i,item in enumerate(q):
    norm = norms[i]
    if tok1 in norm and tok2 in norm:
        candidates.append((i, q[i]['ayah_text'], norm))
len(candidates), candidates[:50]

# find surah 'التوبة' verses
surah_name = "التوبة"
surah_verses = [item for item in q if item.get('surah_name')==surah_name]
len(surah_verses), surah_verses[:10]

# find ayah 17 in 'التوبة' if exists:
verse_17 = [item for item in surah_verses if item.get('ayah_id')==17]
verse_17
